job.title: Senior Software Engineer
job.aboutRole: Design and build reliable, high-scale payment APIs used by millions of businesses. You will own services end to end, from architecture through production operation, working alongside a small team of experienced backend engineers.

responsibilities.item: Design and implement APIs that process payments at very high reliability and scale
Own services end to end, from architecture and code review through on-call operation
Partner with product and infrastructure teams to plan and scope new features
Improve system performance, observability, and incident response practices

successLooksLike.item: Services you own meet strict reliability and latency targets in production
Other engineers regularly seek out your input on architecture decisions
Incidents in your area of ownership are rare and resolved quickly when they happen

requiredSkills.item: 6+ years building backend services in Go, Java, or Ruby
Experience with distributed systems and databases at scale
Strong ownership and clear written communication
Comfortable operating and debugging services in production

desirableSkills.item: Experience working directly in the payments or fintech space
Familiarity with event-driven architectures and message queues

whyJoinUs.item: Work on infrastructure that powers payments for millions of businesses worldwide
Small, senior team with a high degree of autonomy and ownership
Competitive salary, equity, and comprehensive health benefits

job.title: Frontend Engineer
job.aboutRole: Build fast, accessible interfaces used by hosts and guests around the world. You will work closely with design and product to ship polished, well-tested UI that millions of people rely on every day.

responsibilities.item: Build and maintain user-facing features in React across web and mobile web
Collaborate with designers to translate mockups into accessible, responsive UI
Write unit and integration tests to keep the codebase reliable as it grows
Participate in code review and help raise the bar on frontend quality

successLooksLike.item: Features you ship are fast, accessible, and work well across devices
Your components are reused by other teams without needing rework
You catch usability issues during review, before they reach production

requiredSkills.item: 3+ years building production React applications
Solid grasp of accessibility and responsive design
Comfortable working across design, product, and backend teams
Experience with component-driven development and testing

desirableSkills.item: Experience with design systems or component libraries
Familiarity with performance profiling in the browser

whyJoinUs.item: Fully remote role with a team spread across US time zones
Your work directly shapes an experience used by millions of travelers
Generous learning stipend and travel credit

job.title: Backend Engineer, Platform
job.aboutRole: Build the internal platform tooling that powers every product team's deployments. You will design APIs and infrastructure that other engineers rely on daily, with a direct impact on how quickly the whole company can ship.

responsibilities.item: Design and operate internal platform services used by dozens of product teams
Build tooling that simplifies deployments, rollbacks, and service configuration
Improve the reliability and scalability of core platform infrastructure
Mentor other engineers and help set technical direction for the platform team

successLooksLike.item: Product teams ship faster because of tools and infrastructure you've built
Platform incidents are rare, well-understood, and quickly resolved
Engineers across the company describe the platform as easy to work with

requiredSkills.item: 5+ years working on infrastructure or platform teams
Experience with Kubernetes and container orchestration
Track record of mentoring other engineers
Strong understanding of service reliability and observability practices

desirableSkills.item: Experience building internal developer tools or CLIs
Familiarity with infrastructure-as-code tooling such as Terraform

whyJoinUs.item: High-leverage role where your work multiplies the productivity of other teams
Well-resourced platform team with strong engineering culture
Competitive compensation and equity package

job.title: Data Scientist
job.aboutRole: Analyze viewing and engagement data to guide product and content decisions. You will partner with engineering and product teams to turn insights into action that shapes what members see and how they experience the product.

responsibilities.item: Analyze engagement and viewing data to surface actionable product insights
Design and evaluate experiments to test product and content hypotheses
Build dashboards and reporting that product teams rely on regularly
Present findings and recommendations directly to product leadership

successLooksLike.item: Your analysis directly informs product and content decisions
Experiments you design produce clear, actionable results
Stakeholders trust your numbers and come back to you with new questions

requiredSkills.item: 3+ years in an applied data science or analytics role
Strong SQL and experience with Python or R
Comfortable presenting findings to non-technical stakeholders
Solid understanding of experiment design and statistical inference

desirableSkills.item: Experience with large-scale data pipelines or distributed data tools
Background in media, streaming, or recommendation analytics

whyJoinUs.item: Your insights influence decisions seen by hundreds of millions of members
Access to rich, large-scale datasets and strong analytics infrastructure
Culture that values freedom and responsibility over process

job.title: Machine Learning Engineer
job.aboutRole: Build and ship recommendation models that reach millions of listeners. You will own the full lifecycle from experimentation through production deployment, working closely with data scientists and backend engineers.

responsibilities.item: Design, train, and evaluate models that power music and podcast recommendations
Own the full ML lifecycle from experimentation through production deployment
Build infrastructure to monitor and retrain models safely at scale
Collaborate with data scientists and product teams to define success metrics

successLooksLike.item: Models you ship measurably improve recommendation quality
Production ML systems you own are stable and easy to monitor
You can move a promising experiment to production without major rework

requiredSkills.item: 5+ years building and deploying ML models in production
Experience with recommendation systems or ranking models
Strong software engineering fundamentals
Comfortable owning models through the full lifecycle, not just experimentation

desirableSkills.item: Experience with large-scale embedding or retrieval systems
Background working with audio, media, or recommendation data

whyJoinUs.item: Your models directly shape what millions of listeners discover every day
Fully remote with flexible working hours across US time zones
Strong ML infrastructure and a team that ships frequently

job.title: Business Analyst
job.aboutRole: Support cross-functional teams by turning raw data into clear, actionable reporting. You will help track key business metrics and surface trends to leadership, working closely with finance, product, and operations teams.

responsibilities.item: Build and maintain recurring reports and dashboards for business stakeholders
Investigate metric changes and summarize findings in clear, concise writeups
Partner with finance and operations teams to track key business metrics
Support ad hoc analysis requests from leadership on short timelines

successLooksLike.item: Stakeholders can self-serve answers from dashboards you've built
Your reporting is accurate and rarely needs correction after the fact
You proactively flag metric anomalies before stakeholders notice them

requiredSkills.item: 1-2 years in a business analysis or reporting role
Comfortable working in Excel, SQL, and dashboard tools
Strong attention to detail and clear communication
Ability to translate business questions into concrete analysis

desirableSkills.item: Experience with BI tools such as Tableau or Looker
Background in payments, fintech, or financial services

whyJoinUs.item: Clear path to grow into a senior analyst or strategy role
Exposure to leadership and cross-functional teams early in your career
Structured onboarding and mentorship from senior analysts

job.title: Senior Business Analyst
job.aboutRole: Lead analysis on strategic initiatives spanning multiple business units. You will define requirements, build models, and present recommendations directly to leadership on decisions that shape company strategy.

responsibilities.item: Lead end-to-end analysis on strategic initiatives spanning multiple teams
Build financial and operational models to support key business decisions
Define requirements and success metrics alongside product and finance leaders
Present findings and recommendations directly to senior leadership

successLooksLike.item: Leadership relies on your analysis to make major strategic decisions
Your models hold up under scrutiny and stand the test of time
Junior analysts look to you for guidance on complex problems

requiredSkills.item: 5+ years in business analysis, strategy, or consulting
Advanced skills in financial or operational modeling
Experience influencing decisions at the leadership level
Excellent written and verbal communication skills

desirableSkills.item: Experience in enterprise SaaS or B2B software strategy
Background working directly with executive leadership teams

whyJoinUs.item: High-visibility role with direct exposure to company strategy
Fully remote with a collaborative, senior analyst team
Strong compensation with meaningful equity upside

job.title: Marketing Manager
job.aboutRole: Own campaign strategy and execution across paid, lifecycle, and product marketing channels. You will work closely with design and product to grow adoption, reporting directly on what's driving results.

responsibilities.item: Plan and execute campaigns across paid, lifecycle, and product marketing channels
Partner with design and product teams to align messaging with new launches
Track campaign performance and report on what's driving growth
Manage budget and channel mix across the marketing calendar

successLooksLike.item: Campaigns you run consistently hit or beat growth targets
Product and design teams see you as a trusted marketing partner
You can clearly explain what's working and why, with data to back it up

requiredSkills.item: 3+ years in a marketing management role
Experience running multi-channel campaigns end to end
Comfortable working with data to guide decisions
Strong project management and cross-functional communication skills

desirableSkills.item: Experience marketing a product-led or self-serve SaaS product
Familiarity with lifecycle and retention marketing tools

whyJoinUs.item: Direct ownership over campaigns with real budget and autonomy
Work closely with a design-led product team on high-visibility launches
Competitive salary plus equity in a fast-growing company

job.title: Content Marketing Specialist
job.aboutRole: Create blog posts, guides, and campaigns that help our audience grow their businesses. You will collaborate with design and SEO to plan a consistent content calendar that drives organic traffic and engagement.

responsibilities.item: Write blog posts, guides, and email content for a growing audience
Plan and maintain a consistent content calendar with design and SEO
Optimize existing content for search performance and engagement
Collaborate with product marketing on launch content and campaigns

successLooksLike.item: Content you publish steadily grows organic traffic and engagement
Your writing requires minimal editing before it goes live
You consistently hit the content calendar without last-minute scrambles

requiredSkills.item: 1-2 years writing content for a marketing or media team
Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills
Familiarity with basic SEO best practices
Comfortable managing multiple pieces of content at once

desirableSkills.item: Experience writing for a B2B SaaS or software audience
Basic familiarity with SEO tools such as Ahrefs or SEMrush

whyJoinUs.item: Your writing reaches a large, engaged audience of business owners
Fully remote role with a supportive, collaborative content team
Clear path to grow into a senior content or product marketing role
